name: modeldev-toolkit
description: ModelDev Toolkit (MDT) is a Node-only workflow toolkit with agents, skills, hooks, commands, and scaffolding for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Gemini

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  modeldev-toolkit installed!
  Run: npx mdt install typescript
  Docs: https://github.com/flatrick/modeldev-toolkit
'
scripts.lint: node scripts/ci/check-dependencies.js eslint markdownlint-cli && eslint . && node scripts/ci/validate-frontmatter-format.js && markdownlint "**/*.md" --ignore node_modules
scripts.test: node scripts/ci/check-dependencies.js eslint markdownlint-cli && node scripts/ci/validate-agents.js && node scripts/ci/validate-commands.js && node scripts/ci/validate-rules.js && node scripts/ci/validate-skills.js && node scripts/ci/validate-hooks.js && node scripts/ci/validate-hook-mirrors.js && node scripts/ci/validate-metadata.js && node scripts/ci/validate-no-hardcoded-paths.js && node scripts/ci/validate-runtime-ignores.js && node scripts/ci/validate-install-packages.js && node scripts/ci/validate-markdown-links.js && node scripts/ci/validate-markdown-path-refs.js && node scripts/ci/validate-frontmatter-format.js && node scripts/verify-tool-setups.js && node tests/run-all.js
